name: Oatmeal Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
Combine the flour, sugar, and salt. Cut in the shortening using a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Stir in the oats. Sprinkle water (1 tablespoon at a time) evenly over the surface; stir with a fork until the dry ingredients are moistened. Shape into a ball and chill.
Roll dough on a lightly floured surface to fit a 9-inch pie plate. Place in the pie plate and trim off excess pastry along the edges. Fold the edges under and flute them. Prick the bottom and sides of the pastry generously with a fork. Bake at 425 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes. Yield: one 9-inch pastry shell.
